name: prismalens
description: Open-source AI-powered incident analysis and root cause detection

scripts.dev:worker:queue: cd packages/@prismalens/worker-python && uv run python worker.py --mode queue
scripts.lint:worker: cd packages/@prismalens/worker-python && uv run ruff check .
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/api && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:generate: cd packages/api && pnpm exec prisma generate
scripts.db:studio: cd packages/api && pnpm exec prisma studio
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/api && pnpm exec prisma migrate reset
